added: Progress indicator during URL analysis — LinearProgressIndicator bar appears while yt-dlp fetches video info
Stable signing architecture hooks — Gradle and GitHub Actions can now use persistent debug/release keystores
fixed: APK update conflict — same applicationId retained with incremented versionCode so new APKs install over old ones
improved: YouTube download quality locked to 360p — downloads without manual selection capped at 360p
YouTube extraction simplified — removed 4-client extractor retry loop, single default yt-dlp call used
